zh.lifeSummary: 當Sabina O'Neill於大約1423年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆安特里姆時，她的父親Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster44歲，母親Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins40歲。她於1461年10月與John Ian Mor Maconald在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1470年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安可斯東普享年48歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sabina O'Neill于大约1423年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆安特里姆时，她的父亲Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster44岁，母亲Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins40岁。她于1461年10月与John Ian Mor Maconald在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1470年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安可斯東普享年48岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: O'Neill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .

nameMeanings.name: Sabina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name meaning ‘Sabine woman’, used occasionally in England since the 14th century. The Sabines were an ancient Italic race whose territory was early taken over by the Romans. According to tradition, the Romans made a raid on the Sabines and carried off a number of their women, but when the Sabines came for revenge the women succeeded in making peace between the two groups. The name Sabina was borne by three minor early Christian saints, in particular a Roman maiden martyred in about 127 .

en.lifeSummary: When Sabina O'Neill was born about 1423, in Antrim, County Antrim, Ireland, her father, Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster, was 44 and her mother, Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins, was 40. She married John Ian Mor Maconald in October 1461, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1470, in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sabina O'Neill est née environ 1423, à Antrim, County Antrim, Irlande, son père, Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé John Ian Mor Maconald en octobre 1461, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Corstorphine, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sabina O'Neill um 1423 in Antrim, County Antrim, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster 44 und ihre Mutter Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins 40. Sie hat im Oktober 1461 in Scotland John Ian Mor Maconald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sabina O'Neill è nata il circa 1423 nel Antrim, County Antrim, Irlanda, sua padre, Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato John Ian Mor Maconald nel ottobre 1461, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1470, nel Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sabina O'Neillが約1423年にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムアントリムで生まれた時，父Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulsterは44歳，母Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higginsは40歳であった。1461年10月にスコットランドでJohn Ian Mor Maconaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1470年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンコルストルフィンで48歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sabina O'Neill(이)가 대략 1423년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 앤트림에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1461년 10월 스컷랜드에서 John Ian Mor Maconald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 코르스토르필인에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland: Corstorphine, Edinburghshire, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sabina O'Neill nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Antrim, County Antrim, Irlanda, seu pai, Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com John Ian Mor Maconald em outubro de 1461, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1470, em Corstorphine, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sabina O'Neill родилась около 1423 г. в местности антрим, коунти антрим, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Ian Mor Maconald октябрь 1461 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности корсторфаин, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sabina O'Neill nació aproximadamente 1423, en Antrim, County Antrim, Irlanda, su papá, Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins, tenía 40 años. Se casó con John Ian Mor Maconald en octubre de 1461, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1470, en Corstorphine, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
